<style>:root{--ease-base:cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);--ease-spring:cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);--ease-out:cubic-bezier(0.0,0,0.2,1);--t-base:0.3s;--t-spring:0.5s;}*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px;}body{background-color:#0B0B0B;color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'HeliosExt',sans-serif;font-weight:400;line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;}img{max-width:100%;display:block;}a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;}ul{list-style:none;}button{border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;font:inherit;}.nav_link::before{content:'';}.nav_link::before{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:1px;background-color:#E9E0D3;transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:right;transition:transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);pointer-events:none;}.nav_link:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);transform-origin:left;}.nav_burger.open span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg);}.nav_burger.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;}.nav_burger.open span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg);}.hero::before{content:'';}.hero::before{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle 450px at 50% 0%,rgba(233,224,211,0.06) 0%,transparent 100%),linear-gradient(to right,rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:100% 100%,20px 20px,20px 20px;background-position:center center;pointer-events:none;}.hero_float-google{--dur:4.5s;--delay:0s;--rot:-15deg;}.hero_float-instagram{--dur:5s;--delay:0.8s;--rot:8deg;}.hero_float-tiktok{--dur:4s;--delay:1.5s;--rot:25deg;}.hero_float-facebook{--dur:4.2s;--delay:1s;--rot:-12deg;}.stats_metric:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.12s;}.stats_metric:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.24s;}.press::before,.press::after{content:'';}.press::before,.press::after{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:120px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none;}.press::before{left:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,#0B0B0B,transparent);}.press::after{right:0;background:linear-gradient(to left,#0B0B0B,transparent);}.email-swiper{--swiper-theme-color:#0B0B0B;--swiper-navigation-size:16px;}.email-prev::after,.email-next::after{content:'prev';}.email-prev::after,.email-next::after{font-family:swiper-icons;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;}.email-next::after{content:'next';}.swiper-button-prev::after,.swiper-button-next::after{font-size:14px;font-weight:800;}.revenue_visual::after{content:'';}.revenue_visual::after{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 30%,transparent 20%,rgba(11,11,11,0.4) 100%),linear-gradient(to top,#0B0B0B 0%,transparent 35%);pointer-events:none;border-radius:inherit;}.capability-card:nth-child(2){transition-delay:0.12s;}.capability-card:nth-child(3){transition-delay:0.24s;}[data-glow]{--base:37;--spread:20;--radius:8;--border:1.5;--backdrop:rgba(22,22,22,0.4);--size:380;--outer:1;--border-size:calc(1.5 * 1px);--spotlight-size:calc(380 * 1px);--hue:calc(37+(0 * 20));--active-opacity:0;}[data-glow]{position:relative;background-image:radial-gradient( calc(380 * 1px) calc(380 * 1px) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(calc(37+(0 * 20)) 33% 80% / calc(0.08 * 0)),transparent );background-color:rgba(22,22,22,0.4);border:calc(1.5 * 1px) solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);transition:--active-opacity 0.3s ease;}[data-glow]::before,[data-glow]::after{content:"";}[data-glow]::before,[data-glow]::after{pointer-events:none;position:absolute;inset:calc(calc(1.5 * 1px) * -1);border:calc(1.5 * 1px) solid transparent;border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);background-size:calc(100%+(2 * calc(1.5 * 1px))) calc(100%+(2 * calc(1.5 * 1px)));background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:50% 50%;mask:linear-gradient(transparent,transparent),linear-gradient(white,white);mask-clip:padding-box,border-box;mask-composite:intersect;-webkit-mask-composite:destination-in;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s ease;}[data-glow]::before{background-image:radial-gradient( calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.75) calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.75) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(calc(37+(0 * 20)) 33% 70% / 1),transparent 100% );filter:brightness(1.5);}[data-glow]::after{background-image:radial-gradient( calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.5) calc(calc(380 * 1px) * 0.5) at calc(0 * 1px) calc(0 * 1px),hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.6),transparent 100% );}[data-glow] [data-glow]{position:absolute;inset:0;will-change:filter;opacity:1;border-radius:calc(8 * 1px);filter:blur(20px);background:none;pointer-events:none;border:none;}[data-glow]>[data-glow]::before{inset:-10px;border-width:10px;}.cta-section::before{content:'';}.cta-section::before{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle 600px at 50% 50%,rgba(233,224,211,0.05) 0%,transparent 100%),linear-gradient(to right,rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:100% 100%,20px 20px,20px 20px;pointer-events:none;z-index:-1;}.footer_nav-link::before{content:'';}.footer_nav-link::before{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:1px;background-color:#E9E0D3;transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:right;transition:transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);pointer-events:none;}.footer_nav-link:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);transform-origin:left;}@media (max-width:991px){.capability-card:nth-child(3){grid-column:1 / -1;max-width:400px;margin:0 auto;}}@media (max-width:991px){.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (max-width:767px){.capability-card:nth-child(3){grid-column:auto;max-width:100%;}}@media (max-width:767px){.creatives_col:nth-child(3),.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (max-width:479px){.creatives_col:nth-child(3),.creatives_col:nth-child(4),.creatives_col:nth-child(5){display:none;}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:0.01ms;animation-iteration-count:1;transition-duration:0.01ms;}}@keyframes floatBob{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) rotate(var(--rot));}50%{transform:translateY(-14px) rotate(calc(var(--rot)+4deg));}}</style>
